titleStmt.title: SII 7.565: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 565. (A.R. No. 338 of 1901). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrī . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1314 neya
Āṁgīrasa saṁvatsarada vayiśākha su 10 gu . svasti . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara catussamudrādhīsvara śrīvīrahariharamahārāyaru su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgayyalu rāyakaṁsanārāyaṇanaṁba birudanuḷḷa Ādityamallana vaṁśada mallidēvarājayyara nāgā
yigaḷa kumāra mayilappagaḷu taṁmma tāyitaṁdagaḷige puṁṇyāvahahāge svadharṁmmārjitadānadaṁ penugoṁḍeya ceṁnavīrabhadradēvarige māḍi
sida paḍāvaṇa bāgila gōpurakke maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī Ādityapratimaiḥ prakāśitadiśābhāgaḥ pratāpōdayairādityānvayabhūṣaṇaṁ bhuvi mahānādatya
mallō nṛpaḥ . Āsītsaptasamudramudritamahījaṁghaulakīrttiśriyā yēnārakṣi sapādalakṣagiriṣu kṣōṇī ciraṁ dharmmataḥ [. 1*] tasyānvayē viśālēbhūtsumanōhṛdayaṁgamaḥ [.]
śrīmallidēvarājākhyō maṁdāra Iva naṁdanē [. 2*] nāgāṁbāyāmabhūttasmā nmailapākhyō mahāyaśāḥ . svātimēghādati svachaḥ śuktaumuktāmaṇiryyathā . [3 .*] śrīpaṁ
ḍitārādhyagurōḥ prasādāttatvaṁ viditvā taruṇēṁdumauḷēḥ . yō rā�yaciṁtākulitōpyataṁdrastrīnētrapādārccana jāgarūkaḥ . [4 .*] jalanidhiśaśadharahutavahadharaṇī
saṁkhyē śakābdasamudāyē . Aṁgirasaśaradi māsē vaiśākhe dhavaḷapakṣadaśamī yā [5 .*] tasyāṁ suraguruvārē sadguṇaśīlassa mailapāmātyaḥ . Iha rāyakaṁsanārā
yaṇa Iti jagati prasiddhabiridāṁkaḥ [6 .*] prītyā ghanagirinagarīmadhivasatō vīrabhadradēvasya . gōpuramidamatiruciraṁ paramāścaryyapradāyakaṁ niramāyāt . [7 .*]
śrīmailapasya kṛtinō gōpuranirmmāṇanirmmaḷō dharmmaḥ . Ātapanamāniśākaramātārakamēṣa vijayatāṁ lōkē [8 .*] maṁgaḷaṁ bhavatu . śrī śrī śrī jāvagallapurāṇa dakēśava
bhaṭṭara kṛti . śrīceṁnamallikārjjuna . śrīAt the end of the record are cut the figures of the crescent and the sun with that of a upwards.
Digital edition of SII 7.565 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
